transcription.text: S.S.P. 17 Great Machines. Ready for action. And here we are at the Elm Street 500. I see Greg and Larry with their S.S.P. Blackjack and Jetstar. They're off. Both cars topping 12,000 RPMs. Uh-oh. Here's Mark Mercer and Coppercock going the wrong way. A crash. Blackjack's clear. It jumps and wins. S.S.P. 17 Great Machines. S.S.P. by Kenner. Each S.S.P. racer sold separately.

segments.text: S.S.P. 17 Great Machines. Ready for action.
And here we are at the Elm Street 500.
I see Greg and Larry with their S.S.P. Blackjack and Jetstar.
They're off. Both cars topping 12,000 RPMs.
Uh-oh. Here's Mark Mercer and Coppercock going the wrong way.
A crash. Blackjack's clear. It jumps and wins.
S.S.P. by Kenner. Each S.S.P. racer sold separately.
